name: Stir Crazy Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Put flour, 1 1/2 cups sugar, cocoa, soda, and salt into an ungreased 13X9X2 inch metal baking pan.
2. Stir with a fork to mix; form 3 wells in the flour mixture.
3. Pour oil into one well, vinegar into another, and vanilla into the third.
4. Pour cold coffee over all ingredients and stir with a fork until well mixed (do not beat).
5. Combine remaining sugar and cinnamon; sprinkle over the batter.
6. Bake in an oven set to 350 degrees for 35-40 minutes.
